summary: ManipalCigna Sarvah is a comprehensive health insurance product offering three distinct plans (Pratham, Uttam, and Param) tailored to provide different levels of coverage. The product features wellness benefits with up to 20% premium discounts for walking, zero waiting periods with Tatkal benefit, unlimited restoration of sum insured, and coverage up to ₹3 crores for major illnesses.
coverage: Hospitalization coverage up to ₹3 cr for major illnesses
Unlimited restoration of base sum insured for related and unrelated illness/injury
Maternity and Newborn hospitalization expenses covered (optional cover)
Personal accident cover up to ₹3 cr (optional cover)
Non-medical expenses coverage including gloves, masks, and durable medical equipment
Anant Care with unlimited coverage for major illnesses and accidents (Heart Conditions, Cancer, Stroke, Major Organ/Bone Marrow Transplant or Accident)
Surplus benefit providing additional 100% of Sum Insured from day 1 for first claim
waiting_periods: Zero waiting period with Tatkal benefit
Sarathi reduces listed PED waiting period to 30 days from usual 36 months for Pre-Existing diseases such as Asthma, Diabetes, Dyslipidemia, Obesity, Hypertension
co_pay: No Zonal Co-pay - treatment available in any city without additional financial burden
claims_information: Unlimited restoration of Sum Insured multiple times in a policy year
No limits on claims for major illnesses and accidents with Anant Care
Gullak benefit guarantees up to 15x bonus over base Sum Insured irrespective of claims

faqs.question: What is ManipalCigna Sarvah?
faqs.answer: ManipalCigna Sarvah is a comprehensive health insurance product offering three distinct plans (Pratham, Uttam, and Param) tailored to provide different levels of coverage for your health insurance needs.

faqs.question: What are the three plans available under ManipalCigna Sarvah?
faqs.answer: The three plans available are Sarvah Pratham (Essential Health Insurance Plan), Sarvah Uttam (Infinite Health Insurance Plan), and Sarvah Param (Instant Health Insurance Plan).

faqs.question: What is the maximum hospitalization coverage available?
faqs.answer: Hospitalization coverage is available up to ₹3 crores for major illnesses.

faqs.question: What wellness benefits are offered?
faqs.answer: You can get up to 20% discount on premium just by walking with wellness benefits, and up to 7.5% discount on a no-claim year.

faqs.question: What is the Tatkal benefit?
faqs.answer: Tatkal benefit ensures you have absolutely Zero Waiting Period, allowing you to receive care and coverage right from the start with no delays.

faqs.question: What is the Sarathi benefit?
faqs.answer: Sarathi reduces your listed PED (Pre-Existing Disease) waiting period to 30 days from the usual 36 months, even if you have conditions like Asthma, Diabetes, Dyslipidemia, Obesity, or Hypertension.

faqs.question: What is the Gullak benefit?
faqs.answer: Gullak benefit guarantees up to 15x bonus over the base Sum Insured (up to 1500% increase), irrespective of claims. Your Gullak balance grows by 100% of the Base Sum Insured each year.

faqs.question: What is the Surplus benefit?
faqs.answer: Surplus benefit ensures additional 100% of Sum Insured from day 1 for the first claim each policy year, giving you double protection.

faqs.question: What is Anant Care?
faqs.answer: Anant Care provides unlimited coverage and no limits on claims for major illnesses and accidents, specifically for Heart Conditions, Cancer, Stroke, Major Organ/Bone Marrow Transplant or Accident.

faqs.question: Is there any zonal co-pay?
faqs.answer: No, there are no zonal co-pay worries. You can get treated in any city of your choice without any additional financial burden.

faqs.question: What is the restoration benefit?
faqs.answer: You get unlimited restoration of your base Sum Insured even for related and unrelated illness/injury, multiple times in a policy year.

faqs.question: Is maternity coverage available?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maternity and Newborn hospitalization expenses are covered as an optional cover on payment of additional premium.

faqs.question: Is personal accident cover included?
faqs.answer: Personal accident cover up to ₹3 cr is available as an optional cover on payment of additional premium in all three plans.

faqs.question: What non-medical expenses are covered?
faqs.answer: Complete coverage is provided for non-medical items and durable medical equipment, including gloves, masks, and more.

faqs.question: What is the renewal discount available?
faqs.answer: You can get an extra 2.5% discount if you renew within 15 days.

faqs.question: In which plans is Anant Care available?
faqs.answer: Anant Care is available as an optional cover on payment of additional premium in ManipalCigna Sarvah Uttam Plan and ManipalCigna Sarvah Param Plan.

faqs.question: In which plans is Gullak benefit available?
faqs.answer: Gullak benefit is available as an optional cover on payment of additional premium in ManipalCigna Sarvah Uttam Plan and ManipalCigna Sarvah Pratham Plan.

faqs.question: How does the Gullak benefit work over time?
faqs.answer: Starting with a base Sum Insured of ₹10L, the total Sum Insured grows to ₹20L after 1 year, ₹30L after 2 years, and continues growing by ₹10L each year until reaching ₹1.5Cr after 15 years.

faqs.question: What pre-existing diseases are covered under Sarathi benefit?
faqs.answer: Pre-existing diseases covered include Asthma, Diabetes, Dyslipidemia, Obesity, and Hypertension with reduced waiting period of 30 days.

faqs.question: What is the company's registration number?
faqs.answer: ManipalCigna Health Insurance Company Limited has IRDAI Reg. No.: 151 and CIN: U66000MH2012PLC227948.

faqs.question: What is the UIN for ManipalCigna Sarvah?
faqs.answer: The UIN for ManipalCigna Sarvah is MCIHLIP26038V022526.

faqs.question: What is the toll-free number for customer support?
faqs.answer: The toll-free number is 1800-102-4462.

faqs.question: Where is the registered office located?
faqs.answer: The registered office is at 401/402, 4th Floor, Raheja Titanium, Off Western Express Highway, Goregaon East, Mumbai – 400 063.

faqs.question: What award did the company win?
faqs.answer: The company won the Health Insurance Category award in June 2025, based on a survey of 1800 people by NielsenIQ.

faqs.question: Is Tatkal benefit available in all plans?
faqs.answer: Yes, Tatkal benefit providing zero waiting period is available across all three Sarvah plans.

faqs.question: What conditions are covered under Anant Care unlimited coverage?
faqs.answer: Anant Care provides unlimited coverage for Heart Conditions, Cancer, Stroke, Major Organ/Bone Marrow Transplant, and Accidents.

faqs.question: How much discount can I get for no claims?
faqs.answer: You can get up to 7.5% discount on a no-claim year.

faqs.question: What is the maximum personal accident cover available?
faqs.answer: Personal accident cover is available up to ₹3 crores as an optional cover.

faqs.question: Does the restoration benefit apply to both related and unrelated illnesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, unlimited restoration of Sum Insured applies to both related and unrelated illnesses/injuries.
